Antibacterial Resistance Lab - Team Member - Kyuwon Shim (00565)
[Settlement] Participation of 2026 KMB Winter Symposium (Control No. 26000272)
Mona Yongpyong Dragon Valley Hotel Grand Ballroom, Pyeongchang, Korea

Participation in 2026 KMB Winter Symposium for scientific exchange on integrative approaches for microbiology and biotechnology, focusing on AI applications in protein science, drug discovery, synthetic biology, and microbiome research
Korean Society for Microbiology and Biotechnology (KMB), Mona Yongpyong Dragon Valley Hotel Grand Ballroom

Martin Steinegger (SNU), Park Geun-Wan (KIST), Ko Jun-Su (Arontier), Kim Tae-Hyung (Bionexus), Son Hong-Seok (Korea Univ.), Kim Sang-Gyu (KAIST), Yoon Sung-Ho (Konkuk Univ.), Kim Ha-Sung (KRIBB), Lee Dae-Won (Chung-Ang Univ.), Kim Hyun-Uk (KAIST)
Others (Activities related to business travel purpose, etc.)
Poster sessions, networking with Korean researchers from SNU, KAIST, Korea Univ., KIST, KRIBB, informal discussions on collaboration opportunities for AI-driven AMR research

Kyuwon Shim (Antibacterial Resistance Lab - Team Member) 2026-02-03 13:45:47
[No opinion]
